blocks.text: It's throughput — how many cycles fit the same window.

accepted.text:
Agents keep failing at the same tasks.
Gartner's 2025 AI deployment survey found that 85% of AI projects fail in production. McKinsey's 2025 State of AI report found that fewer than 20% of AI pilots scale to production within 18 months.
